tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch the contents of a URL and return the body.

tools.name: register_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook endpoint for later callbacks.

permissions.title: Network access capability
permissions.description: Tool metadata or config hints indicate the server may contact external services.
permissions.remediation: Check the server source and destination service before exposing private workspace data.

evidence: server-side fetch verb in tool name or description
ssrf_findings.description: A tool accepts a caller-controllable URL or host and appears to fetch it server-side, which can reach internal services or cloud metadata endpoints.
ssrf_findings.title: Server-side request forgery (SSRF) capability
ssrf_findings.remediation: Confirm the server validates and allowlists outbound targets and blocks link-local, loopback, and metadata addresses before enabling it for untrusted input.

ssrf_findings.description: A tool or resource exposes a URL-shaped input or a caller-templated remote host, which may let a caller steer where the server connects.
ssrf_findings.title: Possible SSRF-prone request capability
ssrf_findings.remediation: Review how the server resolves and fetches this target; restrict it to known, trusted destinations before exposing private workspace data.
